requirement_topic.en: EVSE Product Safety — UL 2202 / UL 2594 and IEC 61851 References

summary.en: Trinidad and Tobago does not yet have a confirmed public EVSE-specific whole-unit certification rule in the source set used for this dataset. Because the market is 60 Hz and US-heritage, project owners, insurers, utilities, and charge-point operators are likely to request North American EVSE safety evidence such as UL 2594 for AC EV supply equipment and UL 2202 for DC charging equipment, with IEC 61851 evidence also useful where international project specifications reference IEC practice. Safety documentation should address protective earthing, shock protection, overcurrent and overtemperature protection, emergency stop where applicable, enclosure rating, cable temperature rise, fault response, markings, and installation instructions for 115/230 V 60 Hz service.
summary.zh: 在本数据集使用的来源范围内，尚未确认特立尼达和多巴哥已公开发布专门针对EVSE整机认证的规则。由于该市场为60 Hz且承袭美国体系，项目业主、保险方、公用事业和充电点运营商可能要求北美EVSE安全证据，例如交流电动汽车供电设备UL 2594和直流充电设备UL 2202；如国际项目规范引用IEC体系，IEC 61851证据也具有实用价值。安全文件应覆盖保护接地、防触电、过流及过温保护、适用时的急停、外壳防护、电缆温升、故障响应、标识，以及面向115/230 V 60 Hz供电的安装说明。
summary.zht: 在本數據集使用的來源範圍內，尚未確認千里達及托巴哥已公開發佈專門針對EVSE整機認證的規則。由於該市場為60 Hz且承襲美國體系，項目業主、保險方、公用事業和充電點運營商可能要求北美EVSE安全證據，例如交流電動汽車供電設備UL 2594和直流充電設備UL 2202；如國際項目規範引用IEC體系，IEC 61851證據也具有實用價值。安全文件應覆蓋保護接地、防觸電、過流及過溫保護、適用時的急停、外殼防護、電纜溫升、故障響應、標識，以及面向115/230 V 60 Hz供電的安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: UL 2202 — DC Charging Equipment for Electric Vehicles
TTBS standards and technical regulation scope to confirm for EVSE

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging systems, plus GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930 DC communication. GB/T test evidence is useful for engineering review but does not by itself prove compliance with UL 2594, UL 2202, IEC 61851, Trinidad and Tobago electrical-installation expectations, or 115/230 V 60 Hz operation.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统，以及GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930直流通信。GB/T测试证据可用于工程审查，但其本身不能证明符合UL 2594、UL 2202、IEC 61851、特立尼达和多巴哥电气安装预期或115/230 V 60 Hz运行要求。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統，以及GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930直流通訊。GB/T測試證據可用於工程審查，但其本身不能證明符合UL 2594、UL 2202、IEC 61851、千里達及托巴哥電氣安裝預期或115/230 V 60 Hz運行要求。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare UL 2594 evidence for AC EVSE or UL 2202 evidence for DC charging equipment where requested, an IEC 61851 clause matrix where project specifications require it, 60 Hz safety and thermal retest results, enclosure and corrosion suitability for a humid coastal Caribbean environment, English installation manuals, and protective-device coordination data for the site. A GB/T 18487 report without clause mapping and 60 Hz validation is not enough for a Trinidad and Tobago technical file.
gap.zh: 出口商应在需要时准备交流EVSE的UL 2594证据或直流充电设备的UL 2202证据；如项目规范要求，应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵；还应提供60 Hz安全及热重测结果、适用于潮湿加勒比沿海环境的外壳和耐腐蚀适用性、英文安装手册，以及场站保护器件配合数据。未进行条款映射和60 Hz验证的GB/T 18487报告不足以构成特立尼达和多巴哥技术档案。
gap.zht: 出口商應在需要時準備交流EVSE的UL 2594證據或直流充電設備的UL 2202證據；如項目規範要求，應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣；還應提供60 Hz安全及熱重測結果、適用於潮濕加勒比沿海環境的外殼和耐腐蝕適用性、英文安裝手冊，以及場站保護器件配合數據。未進行條款映射和60 Hz驗證的GB/T 18487報告不足以構成千里達及托巴哥技術檔案。

mandatory_status.target: Confirm with TTBS, utility, project owner, insurer, and installer — no single public EVSE whole-unit rule confirmed here; UL 2202 / UL 2594 or IEC 61851 evidence may become mandatory through tender, insurance, utility, or site approval requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not a direct UL 2202 / UL 2594 or Trinidad and Tobago acceptance substitute

source.publisher: Trinidad and Tobago Bureau of Standards (TTBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T safety evidence as a starting point only. Trinidad and Tobago-facing files should include the requested UL 2202 / UL 2594 or IEC 61851 evidence, 60 Hz retesting, humid coastal environmental suitability, and site installation documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将中国GB/T安全证据作为起点。面向特立尼达和多巴哥的文件应包括所要求的UL 2202 / UL 2594或IEC 61851证据、60 Hz重测、潮湿沿海环境适用性，以及场站安装文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將中國GB/T安全證據作為起點。面向千里達及托巴哥的文件應包括所要求的UL 2202 / UL 2594或IEC 61851證據、60 Hz重測、潮濕沿海環境適用性，以及場站安裝文件。
